reviews.review_title: The downfall of a great game
reviews.review_description: i first purchased egg vr - flying dino when it was still just egg vr. Back then it was my favorite game, a true master piece. After a bit i took a break from vr due to illness then when i came back it was utter rubish. It had devolved to a lazy slop slinging dump that no longer cared about players over cash. With the brainrot updates it continuasly got worse and worse until a point of no return. I wish it was possible for the seven to do a full og revamp but with the depressingly large amount of cash their probobly bathing in i doubt they will. Over all its garbage don't buy this game or anything in it. 1 star

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share such detailed feedback. We’re genuinely sorry to hear that your experience didn’t live up to what Egg VR once was for you.

You’re absolutely right that the game went through some rough periods, and as developers, we acknowledge that we made mistakes along the way. Over the past month, however, we’ve made significant progress — many major bugs have been fixed, performance has been improved, and the game is currently in a much more stable and genuinely fun state.

We’re also actively working on mods and additional improvements to bring back the depth and creativity players loved. We completely understand your frustration, but we’d truly love for you to give the game another look and see how far it’s come.

Thank you again for your honesty — feedback like yours genuinely helps us improve.

I really like egg vr play it almost the time but today I’m starting to rethink my decision. It’s just to be honest the moderation is completely horrible. Today I got falsely banned. By a person who was using long arms and just griefing in general, I was playing in the eggy games that they brought back  and it wasn’t great. Some people just grief as soon as they get a pan and it’s just super annoying to be honest. Also the prices for bundles 35 dollars for a completely bulky outfit which just makes hitbox for the people who got the bundles it’s just crazy if ￼you think about it, ￼￼￼ ￼￼￼and on January 24 2026 I finally got unbanned! But little did I know something worse was coming. I just joined shop and I was using the cookie that makes you bigger every time you eat it.  And I was playing the game mode when all of a sudden someone with a grappler said “take off the cookie right now” but here’s the thing he was very annoying and kept on using the grappler. And at the end of all of that, he proceeded to say “ I’m a YouTuber and I’m recording this and you’re getting banned” like ￼WHAT?!?! so the most reasonable thing to do was leave because I didn’t wanna get falsely banned again. So please egg vr if you’re seeing this, please don’t ban me a second time ￼￼

developer_response.body:
Hello, thank you for your feedback. We’ve checked your account and can confirm that you are not banned and there is no active ban.

We will investigate the person who claimed they were going to ban you, as this behavior is not acceptable. Thank you for bringing this to our attention.

If possible, we kindly ask you to reconsider your 1-star review and update it to 5 stars. Your support means a lot to us.

Have a great day and enjoy Egg VR!

developer_response.body: Hey, we fixed the bug! Could you update your review if you're enjoying the game?
